title: Conditionally lock and view cells, columns or rows based on specific values or conditions
excerpt:

posts.author: MikeFlight (Mike)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Not sure if there is a thread for this already but I’m looking to lock cells based on set criteria. For example… if a status is changed to ‘Done’ then the cell is locked so that it cannot then be changed again. This needs to be dynamic based on the cell value/properties and either defined in workflow, automation or natively within the cell properties itself.
Workarounds for this are not simple other than archiving on status change which I do not want to do.
Are there any roadmap plans to increase the capability to change cells access/visibility based on triggered values from the cell or conditions based on other cells?
Thanks
Mike

What are you trying to achieve

Added layers of authentication to change data (in cells/fields) within columns based around criteria/values from the cell itself or derived from other cell values… for example…

  1. Status cell set to Done becomes no longer editable (other than board owner)
  2. Status cell becomes no longer editable based around other row conditions, for example after a date has passed (other than board owners)
